Experiment 2 Analysis

Set Up

#load in pre-tidied and wrangled dataset
exp2_tidied <- read_csv("exp2_tidied.csv")

Wrangling

#factorising
exp2_tidied <- exp2_tidied %>%
  mutate(Participant = factor(Participant),
         RestrictorType = factor(RestrictorType), 
         RestrictorPosition = factor(RestrictorPosition), 
         StimID = factor(StimID))
#deviation coding factors
contrasts(exp2_tidied$RestrictorType) <- matrix(c(.5, -.5))
contrasts(exp2_tidied$RestrictorPosition) <- matrix(c(.5, -.5))

Descriptives & dataviz for RTs for each chunk

#pull out chunk names
roi_columns <- grep("^C\\d+\\.RT.RESID$|^SPILL\\.RT.RESID$", names(exp2_tidied), value = TRUE)

chunks_data <- exp2_tidied %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(roi_columns), 
               names_to = "Chunk", 
               values_to = "ReadingTime") %>%
  group_by(Condition, Chunk) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_RT = mean(ReadingTime),
    sd_RT = sd(ReadingTime),
    se_RT = sd_RT / sqrt(n())
  ) %>%
  separate(Condition, into = c("RestrictorPosition", "RestrictorType"), remove = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(ChunkLabel = case_when(
    RestrictorPosition == "EXT" & Chunk == "C1.RT.RESID" ~ "EVERY",
    RestrictorPosition == "EXT" & Chunk == "C2.RT.RESID" ~ "NP",
    RestrictorPosition == "EXT" & Chunk == "C3.RT.RESID" ~ "VP",
    RestrictorPosition == "EXT" & Chunk == "C4.RT.RESID" ~ "PP",
    RestrictorPosition == "EXT" & Chunk == "SPILL.RESID.RESID" ~ "SPILL",
    RestrictorPosition == "INT" & Chunk == "C1.RT.RESID" ~ "EVERY",
    RestrictorPosition == "INT" & Chunk == "C2.RT.RESID" ~ "NP",
    RestrictorPosition == "INT" & Chunk == "C3.RT.RESID" ~ "PP",
    RestrictorPosition == "INT" & Chunk == "C4.RT.RESID" ~ "VP",
    RestrictorPosition == "INT" & Chunk == "SPILL.RESID.RESID" ~ "SPILL",
    TRUE ~ Chunk  # Default case, if no specific condition
  ))
#plots
ext_chunks_plot <- chunks_data %>%
  filter(RestrictorPosition == "EXT") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Chunk, y = mean_RT, group = RestrictorType, color = RestrictorType)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_RT - se_RT, ymax = mean_RT + se_RT, group = RestrictorType), 
              fill = "grey", alpha = 0.2, linetype = "blank") +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = RestrictorType), linewidth = 1) +  
  geom_point(aes(shape = RestrictorType), size = 3) +  
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Mean Reading Time (ms.)") +
  theme_light(base_size = 20, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette) +  
  facet_grid(vars(RestrictorPosition), switch = "y") +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("EVERY", "NP", "VP", "PP", "SPILL"))

int_chunks_plot <- chunks_data %>%
  filter(RestrictorPosition == "INT") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Chunk, y = mean_RT, group = RestrictorType, color = RestrictorType)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_RT - se_RT, ymax = mean_RT + se_RT, group = RestrictorType), 
              fill = "grey", alpha = 0.2, linetype = "blank") +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = RestrictorType), linewidth = 1) +  
  geom_point(aes(shape = RestrictorType), size = 3) +  
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Mean Reading Time (ms.)") +
  theme_light(base_size = 20, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette) +  
  facet_grid(vars(RestrictorPosition), switch = "y") +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("EVERY", "NP", "PP", "VP", "SPILL"))
#combine plots
ext_chunks_plot + 
  int_chunks_plot + 
  plot_layout(ncol = 1,
              guides = "collect",
              axis_titles = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = "Mean Chunk Reading Times (ms.)",
                  theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                                          size = 30)))

#output summary stats
sum_tbl(exp2_tidied)
## \begin{table}[!h]
## \centering
## \begin{tabular}{lrrrrrr}
## \toprule
## \multicolumn{1}{c}{ } & \multicolumn{2}{c}{PP Region} & \multicolumn{2}{c}{VP Region} & \multicolumn{2}{c}{SPILL Region} \\
## \cmidrule(l{3pt}r{3pt}){2-3} \cmidrule(l{3pt}r{3pt}){4-5} \cmidrule(l{3pt}r{3pt}){6-7}
## Condition & Mean (ms) & SD (ms) & Mean (ms) & SD (ms) & Mean (ms) & SD (ms)\\
## \midrule
## \cellcolor{gray!10}{EXT-OTH} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{-7.91} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{255.46} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{-60.68} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{159.83} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{23.26} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{348.29}\\
## EXT-SUB & -46.52 & 153.32 & -43.12 & 304.06 & -7.38 & 665.09\\
## \cellcolor{gray!10}{INT-OTH} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{-54.04} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{221.45} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{7.90} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{266.66} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{8.17} & \cellcolor{gray!10}{286.22}\\
## INT-SUB & -79.64 & 175.18 & -47.63 & 399.15 & -15.33 & 330.67\\
## \bottomrule
## \end{tabular}
## \end{table}

Reading Time Analysis for Preposition Phrase

#dataviz for condition.
pp_viz <- exp2_tidied %>%
  filter(
    PP.RESID >
      quantile(PP.RESID, .01, na.rm = TRUE),
    PP.RESID <
      quantile(PP.RESID, .99, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = RestrictorType, #group by condition on x axis
             y = PP.RESID, #log RTs on y axis
             fill = RestrictorType)) + #colour by condition
  theme_light(base_size = 25, #default font size
              base_line_size = .5, #default line weight
              base_rect_size = 1, #default polygon border weight
              base_family = "Helvetica") + #font family Helvetica
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) + #violin, don't trim ends
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.3, #boxplot
               outlier.shape = NA) + #don't show outlier dots
  scale_fill_manual(values = cbPalette) + #colour blind friendly palette
  labs(title = "PP Reading Times (ms.)",
       y = "Residual Reading Time (ms.)",
       x = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~RestrictorPosition) +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1), #box around legend
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 30), #center title, title font size
        legend.position = "bottom") + #legend at bottom
  coord_flip() + #flip coordinates so it's horizontal
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black"))
pp_viz

Modelling

#building a buildmer model
set.seed(9876)
pp.blmr1 <- buildmer(PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                       (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                       (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | StimID),
                     buildmerControl = buildmerControl(include = 
                                                         ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition), #inc. ixn.
                     data = exp2_tidied)
#model summary
summary(pp.blmr1)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML
## (p-values based on Wald z-scores) ['lmerMod']
## Formula: 
## PP.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition +  
##     (1 + RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 47589.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -2.4593462 -0.4098095 -0.1252947  0.2118958 23.6185641 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr              
##  Participant (Intercept)          1506.800  38.81752                   
##              RestrictorPosition1  4356.786  66.00595 -0.26327          
##              RestrictorType1      3280.013  57.27140 -0.23002  0.40764 
##  Residual                        38762.767 196.88262                   
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                       Estimate Std. Error  t value
## (Intercept)                         -47.025306   6.040605 -7.78487
## RestrictorType1                      32.109003   9.969613  3.22069
## RestrictorPosition1                  39.628228  10.846362  3.65360
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  13.006264  13.236274  0.98262
##                                                  Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         0.0000000000000069787 ***
## RestrictorType1                                0.00127884 ** 
## RestrictorPosition1                            0.00025859 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1            0.32579314    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.144              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.175  0.242       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
#pp.blmr1 manual model
pp.mod1 <- lmer(PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition | Participant),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(pp.mod1) #OK, main fx of RestrictorType and RestrictorPosition
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorType +  
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 47589.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -2.4593491 -0.4098095 -0.1252941  0.2118983 23.6185635 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr              
##  Participant (Intercept)          1506.837  38.81800                   
##              RestrictorType1      3279.900  57.27041 -0.23000          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4357.010  66.00765 -0.26330  0.40767 
##  Residual                        38762.754 196.88259                   
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -47.025306    6.040658   57.998080
## RestrictorType1                       32.109003    9.969516   58.001147
## RestrictorPosition1                   39.628228   10.846536   57.998965
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1   13.006264   13.236272 3361.997499
##                                      t value         Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -7.78480 0.00000000014067 ***
## RestrictorType1                      3.22072       0.00209739 ** 
## RestrictorPosition1                  3.65354       0.00055766 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  0.98262       0.32586377    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.144              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.175  0.242       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
#increase ranfx
pp.mod2 <- lmer(PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + 
                  (1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
## Warning in checkConv(attr(opt, "derivs"), opt$par, ctrl = control$checkConv, : Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.0041982 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
##   See ?lme4::convergence and ?lme4::troubleshooting.
summary(pp.mod2) #convergence issue
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorType +  
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 47589.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -2.4593202 -0.4098157 -0.1253040  0.2118970 23.6185417 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance       Std.Dev.    Corr              
##  StimID      (Intercept)             0.06844141   0.2616131                   
##  Participant (Intercept)          1506.86444357  38.8183519                   
##              RestrictorType1      3280.47866172  57.2754630 -0.22997          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4356.23263681  66.0017624 -0.26331  0.40771 
##  Residual                        38762.69311171 196.8824347                   
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -47.025306    6.040789   57.424235
## RestrictorType1                       32.109004    9.970005   57.994451
## RestrictorPosition1                   39.628226   10.845926   58.005508
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1   13.006266   13.236261 3355.606616
##                                      t value         Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -7.78463 0.00000000014969 ***
## RestrictorType1                      3.22056       0.00209848 ** 
## RestrictorPosition1                  3.65374       0.00055726 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  0.98262       0.32586346    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.144              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.175  0.242       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
## optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.0041982 (tol = 0.002, component 1)
##   See ?lme4::convergence and ?lme4::troubleshooting.
#add covars
pp.mod3 <- lmer(PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + TrialN +
                  (1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition | Participant),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(pp.mod3) #OK, main fx of RestrictorType and RestrictorPosition
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + TrialN + (1 +  
##     RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 47317.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -2.5596458 -0.4175943 -0.1081655  0.2420865 24.3363502 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr              
##  Participant (Intercept)          1499.808  38.72736                   
##              RestrictorType1      3264.779  57.13824 -0.18372          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4041.667  63.57411 -0.25736  0.47093 
##  Residual                        35828.495 189.28416                   
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                          Estimate    Std. Error            df
## (Intercept)                           47.50207133    8.17271255  201.37417864
## RestrictorType1                       31.59819623    9.78878522   58.00601398
## RestrictorPosition1                   41.86668561   10.44052350   58.00965851
## TrialN                                -1.57788552    0.09331571 3458.18964940
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1   20.57476569   12.73330451 3361.15532713
##                                       t value               Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                           5.81228         0.000000023833 ***
## RestrictorType1                       3.22800             0.00205266 ** 
## RestrictorPosition1                   4.01002             0.00017577 ***
## TrialN                              -16.90911 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1   1.61582             0.10622645    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1 TrialN
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.088                     
## RstrctrPst1 -0.117  0.284              
## TrialN      -0.684  0.003 -0.013       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.024  0.000  0.000 -0.035
#compare - covar mod is better
anova(pp.mod1, pp.mod3) %>% xtable() #latex
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## % latex table generated in R 4.4.2 by xtable 1.8-8 package
## % Sat Mar 14 15:26:52 2026
## \begin{table}[ht]
## \centering
## \begin{tabular}{lrrrrrrrr}
##   \hline
##  & npar & AIC & BIC & logLik & -2*log(L) & Chisq & Df & Pr($>$Chisq) \\ 
##   \hline
## pp.mod1 & 11.00 & 47636.54 & 47704.43 & -23807.27 & 47614.54 &  &  &  \\ 
##   pp.mod3 & 12.00 & 47363.58 & 47437.64 & -23669.79 & 47339.58 & 274.95 & 1 & 0.0000 \\ 
##    \hline
## \end{tabular}
## \end{table}
#check model
check_model(pp.mod3) #OK
#summary
mod_out(pp.mod3)
## 
## \begin{table}[!htbp] \centering 
##   \caption{} 
##   \label{} 
## \begin{tabular}{@{\extracolsep{5pt}}lD{.}{.}{-2} } 
## \\[-1.8ex]\hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textit{Dependent variable:}} \\ 
## \cline{2-2} 
## \\[-1.8ex] & \multicolumn{1}{c}{PP.RESID} \\ 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  Constant & 47.50^{***}$ $(8.17) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1 & 31.60^{**}$ $(9.79) \\ 
##   RestrictorPosition1 & 41.87^{***}$ $(10.44) \\ 
##   TrialN & -1.58^{***}$ $(0.09) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 & 20.57$ $(12.73) \\ 
##  \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## Observations & \multicolumn{1}{c}{3,540} \\ 
## Akaike Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{47,341.37} \\ 
## Bayesian Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{47,415.43} \\ 
## \hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## \textit{Note:}  & \multicolumn{1}{r}{$^{*}$p$<$0.05; $^{**}$p$<$0.01; $^{***}$p$<$0.001} \\ 
## \end{tabular} 
## \end{table}
#checking that EXT conditions are slower than INT conditions overall
pp_emms_pos <- emmeans(pp.mod3,
                       pairwise ~ RestrictorPosition,
                       adjust = "none") #only one comparison made
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
#print
pp_emms_pos
## $emmeans
##  RestrictorPosition emmean   SE df lower.CL upper.CL
##  EXT                 -26.1 7.21 58    -40.5    -11.6
##  INT                 -68.0 8.58 58    -85.1    -50.8
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorType 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
##  contrast  estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
##  EXT - INT     41.9 10.4 58   4.010  0.0002
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorType 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger
#looking to see whether OTH > SUB overall
pp_emms_type <- emmeans(pp.mod3,
                       pairwise ~ RestrictorType,
                       adjust = "none") #only one comparison made
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
#print
pp_emms_type
## $emmeans
##  RestrictorType emmean   SE df lower.CL upper.CL
##  OTH             -31.2 7.25 58    -45.7    -16.7
##  SUB             -62.8 8.15 58    -79.1    -46.5
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorPosition 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
##  contrast  estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
##  OTH - SUB     31.6 9.79 58   3.228  0.0021
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorPosition 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger
#emms
pp_emms_simple <- emmeans(pp.mod3, ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition,
                   adjust = "none")
#contrasts
pp_contrasts_simple <- contrast(pp_emms_simple,
                 adjust = "bonferroni",
                 "pairwise", 
                 simple = "RestrictorType")
#print
pp_contrasts_simple %>%
  xtable()
## % latex table generated in R 4.4.2 by xtable 1.8-8 package
## % Sat Mar 14 15:26:56 2026
## \begin{table}[ht]
## \centering
## \begin{tabular}{lrrrrl}
##   \hline
## contrast & estimate & SE & df & t.ratio & p.value \\ 
##   \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{RestrictorPosition = EXT}\\
## OTH - SUB & 41.8856 & 11.6765 & 117.04 & 3.587 & 0.0005 \\ 
##    \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{RestrictorPosition = INT}\\
## OTH - SUB & 21.3108 & 11.6777 & 117.08 & 1.825 & 0.0706 \\ 
##    \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{{\footnotesize Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger}}\\
## \end{tabular}
## \end{table}
#plot it
pp_emms_ixn_plot <- emmip(pp.mod3, 
                            RestrictorType ~ RestrictorPosition,
                           CIs = TRUE,
                           CIarg = list(lwd = .5,
                                        alpha = 1)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette) + #colour blind friendly palette
  labs(title = "PP EMM Reading Times Interaction Plot",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Mean Reading Time (ms.)",
       x = "RestrictorPosition") + #set up labels/title
  theme_light(base_size = 25, #default font size
              base_line_size = .5, #default line weight
              base_rect_size = 1, #default polygon border weight
              base_family = "Helvetica") + #font family Helvetica
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, #title font size
                                hjust = 0.5), #center title
      legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1), #box around legend
      legend.position = "bottom") #legend at bottom
## Warning: Duplicated aesthetics after name standardisation: linewidth
#print chart
pp_emms_ixn_plot

Look at trials

#look at trials - may be that there's an interaction with TrialN here
pp_trials_viz <- exp2_tidied %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TrialN, y = PP.RESID, color = RestrictorType, linetype = RestrictorType)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Trial Number", y = "Raw Reading Time",
       title = "PP Reading Time by Trial x Condition") +
  theme_light(base_size = 25) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  facet_grid(~RestrictorPosition) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette)
pp_trials_viz
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

#ixn model
pp.mod4 <- lmer(PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition * TrialN +
                  (1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition | Participant),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(pp.mod4) #OK, main fx of RestrictorType and RestrictorPosition
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: PP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition * TrialN + (1 +  
##     RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 47306.9
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -2.5601882 -0.4065798 -0.1048870  0.2455493 24.3618092 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr              
##  Participant (Intercept)          1516.146  38.93772                   
##              RestrictorType1      3335.334  57.75235 -0.17719          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4012.831  63.34691 -0.26140  0.45964 
##  Residual                        35705.693 188.95950                   
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                                 Estimate    Std. Error
## (Intercept)                                  47.90225618    8.18392652
## RestrictorType1                              60.25701111   14.87327840
## RestrictorPosition1                          63.44891133   15.26051333
## TrialN                                       -1.57939128    0.09317309
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1          65.68742367   25.72613040
## RestrictorType1:TrialN                       -0.46694490    0.18602864
## RestrictorPosition1:TrialN                   -0.35188083    0.18617486
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1:TrialN   -0.74376040    0.37319966
##                                                       df   t value
## (Intercept)                                 199.77638044   5.85321
## RestrictorType1                             291.38088717   4.05136
## RestrictorPosition1                         260.10396148   4.15772
## TrialN                                     3454.62855209 -16.95115
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1        3444.11519551   2.55333
## RestrictorType1:TrialN                     3440.65184299  -2.51007
## RestrictorPosition1:TrialN                 3445.90183843  -1.89006
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1:TrialN 3464.11336806  -1.99293
##                                                          Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                                        0.000000019515 ***
## RestrictorType1                                    0.000065360168 ***
## RestrictorPosition1                                0.000043678218 ***
## TrialN                                     < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1                      0.010712 *  
## RestrictorType1:TrialN                                   0.012116 *  
## RestrictorPosition1:TrialN                               0.058834 .  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1:TrialN               0.046348 *  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1 TrialN RsT1:RP1 RT1:TN RP1:TN
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.061                                            
## RstrctrPst1 -0.075  0.154                                     
## TrialN      -0.682  0.006 -0.009                              
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.032  0.017 -0.003 -0.030                       
## RstrctT1:TN  0.005 -0.750 -0.023 -0.005 -0.013                
## RstrctP1:TN -0.009 -0.023 -0.731  0.001  0.003    0.011       
## RsT1:RP1:TN -0.023 -0.011  0.002  0.014 -0.869    0.003  0.000
#check model
check_model(pp.mod4)
#model output
mod_out(pp.mod4)
## 
## \begin{table}[!htbp] \centering 
##   \caption{} 
##   \label{} 
## \begin{tabular}{@{\extracolsep{5pt}}lD{.}{.}{-2} } 
## \\[-1.8ex]\hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textit{Dependent variable:}} \\ 
## \cline{2-2} 
## \\[-1.8ex] & \multicolumn{1}{c}{PP.RESID} \\ 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  Constant & 47.90^{***}$ $(8.18) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1 & 60.26^{***}$ $(14.87) \\ 
##   RestrictorPosition1 & 63.45^{***}$ $(15.26) \\ 
##   TrialN & -1.58^{***}$ $(0.09) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 & 65.69^{*}$ $(25.73) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1:TrialN & -0.47^{*}$ $(0.19) \\ 
##   RestrictorPosition1:TrialN & -0.35$ $(0.19) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1:TrialN & -0.74^{*}$ $(0.37) \\ 
##  \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## Observations & \multicolumn{1}{c}{3,540} \\ 
## Akaike Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{47,336.87} \\ 
## Bayesian Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{47,429.45} \\ 
## \hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## \textit{Note:}  & \multicolumn{1}{r}{$^{*}$p$<$0.05; $^{**}$p$<$0.01; $^{***}$p$<$0.001} \\ 
## \end{tabular} 
## \end{table}
#checking that EXT conditions are slower than INT conditions overall
pp_emms_pos.TRIALS <- emmeans(pp.mod4,
                       pairwise ~ RestrictorPosition,
                       adjust = "none") #only one comparison made
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
#print
pp_emms_pos.TRIALS
## $emmeans
##  RestrictorPosition emmean   SE df lower.CL upper.CL
##  EXT                 -25.5 7.21 58    -40.0    -11.1
##  INT                 -67.9 8.59 58    -85.1    -50.7
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorType 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
##  contrast  estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
##  EXT - INT     42.4 10.4 58   4.069  0.0001
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorType 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger
#looking to see whether OTH > SUB overall
pp_emms_type.TRIALS <- emmeans(pp.mod4,
                       pairwise ~ RestrictorType,
                       adjust = "none")
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
#print
pp_emms_type.TRIALS
## $emmeans
##  RestrictorType emmean   SE   df lower.CL upper.CL
##  OTH             -30.6 7.30 58.1    -45.2    -16.0
##  SUB             -62.9 8.17 58.0    -79.2    -46.5
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorPosition 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
##  contrast  estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
##  OTH - SUB     32.3 9.85 58   3.279  0.0018
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: RestrictorPosition 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger
#emms
pp_emms_simple.TRIALS <- emmeans(pp.mod4, ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition,
                   adjust = "none")
## NOTE: Results may be misleading due to involvement in interactions
#contrasts
pp_contrasts_simple.TRIALS <- contrast(pp_emms_simple.TRIALS,
                 adjust = "tukey",
                 "pairwise", 
                 simple = "RestrictorType")
#print
pp_contrasts_simple.TRIALS %>%
  xtable()
## % latex table generated in R 4.4.2 by xtable 1.8-8 package
## % Sat Mar 14 15:27:01 2026
## \begin{table}[ht]
## \centering
## \begin{tabular}{lrrrrl}
##   \hline
## contrast & estimate & SE & df & t.ratio & p.value \\ 
##   \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{RestrictorPosition = EXT}\\
## OTH - SUB & 42.8487 & 11.7189 & 116.11 & 3.656 & 0.0004 \\ 
##    \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{RestrictorPosition = INT}\\
## OTH - SUB & 21.7182 & 11.7211 & 116.19 & 1.853 & 0.0664 \\ 
##    \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{{\footnotesize Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger}}\\
## \end{tabular}
## \end{table}
#generate sequence of trials
trial_seq <- seq(min(exp2_tidied$TrialN), max(exp2_tidied$TrialN), length.out = 100)

#predict RTs for levels of TrialN given ixn
predicted_data <- emmeans(pp.mod4, ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition * TrialN, 
                          at = list(TrialN = trial_seq), type = "response")

#convert to df for dataviz
pred_df <- as.data.frame(predicted_data)
#plot predicted RTs over trials - the adaptation rate is different; EXT-OTH gets easier so there's an ixn, but it's mediated by TrialN
pp_trials_pred_viz <- pred_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TrialN, y = emmean, color = RestrictorType, linetype = RestrictorType)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = emmean - SE, ymax = emmean + SE, fill = RestrictorType), alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cbPalette) +
  labs(title = "Model-Predicted PP Reading Time Over Trials",
       y = "Predicted Reading Time (ms)",
       x = "Trial Number") +
  facet_grid(~RestrictorPosition) +
  theme_light(base_size = 25) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        legend.position = "bottom")
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## This warning is displayed once per session.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
pp_trials_pred_viz

Reading Time Analysis for Verb Phrase

#dataviz for condition
vp_viz <- exp2_tidied %>%
  filter(
    VP.RESID >
      quantile(VP.RESID, .01, na.rm = TRUE),
    VP.RESID <
      quantile(VP.RESID, .99, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = RestrictorType, #group by condition on x axis
             y = VP.RESID, #log RTs on y axis
             fill = RestrictorType)) + #colour by condition
  theme_light(base_size = 25, #default font size
              base_line_size = .5, #default line weight
              base_rect_size = 1, #default polygon border weight
              base_family = "Helvetica") + #font family Helvetica
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) + #violin, don't trim ends
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.3, #boxplot
               outlier.shape = NA) + #don't show outlier dots
  scale_fill_manual(values = cbPalette) + #colour blind friendly palette
  labs(title = "VP Reading Times (ms.)",
       y = "Residual Reading Time (ms.)",
       x = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~RestrictorPosition) +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1), #box around legend
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 30), #center title, title font size
        legend.position = "bottom") + #legend at bottom
  coord_flip() + #flip coordinates so it's horizontal
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black"))
vp_viz

Modelling

#building a buildmer model first
set.seed(9876)
vp.blmr1 <- buildmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                       (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                       (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | StimID),
                     buildmerControl = buildmerControl(include = 
                                                         ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition), #inc. ixn.
                     data = exp2_tidied)
#model summary
summary(vp.blmr1)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML
## (p-values based on Wald z-scores) ['lmerMod']
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition +  
##     (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50257.7
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.682926 -0.318165 -0.105000  0.164292 37.546551 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr     
##  Participant (Intercept)          1243.928  35.26936          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4261.050  65.27672 -0.35351 
##  Residual                        84834.522 291.26366          
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                       Estimate Std. Error  t value
## (Intercept)                         -35.882407   6.711786 -5.34618
## RestrictorType1                      18.981790   9.790721  1.93875
## RestrictorPosition1                 -32.031942  12.964544 -2.47073
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -73.088164  19.581442 -3.73252
##                                           Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         0.000000089831 ***
## RestrictorType1                         0.05253142 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                     0.01348360 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1     0.00018957 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1  0.000              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.159  0.000       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
#buildmer manual
vp.mod1 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(vp.mod1) #OK, ixn. and pos fx
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |  
##     Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50257.7
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.682926 -0.318165 -0.105000  0.164292 37.546551 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr     
##  Participant (Intercept)          1243.928  35.26936          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4261.050  65.27672 -0.35351 
##  Residual                        84834.522 291.26366          
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -35.882407    6.711786   58.000157
## RestrictorType1                       18.981790    9.790721 3419.999427
## RestrictorPosition1                  -32.031942   12.964544   57.999285
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  -73.088164   19.581442 3419.999427
##                                      t value     Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -5.34618 0.0000015828 ***
## RestrictorType1                      1.93875   0.05261359 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                 -2.47073   0.01644396 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -3.73252   0.00019266 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1  0.000              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.159  0.000       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
#increase ranfx complexity
vp.mod2 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(vp.mod2) #OK, same effects
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |  
##     Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50257.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.689316 -0.318973 -0.102711  0.163990 37.518822 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance   Std.Dev.  Corr     
##  StimID      (Intercept)           193.3133  13.90372          
##  Participant (Intercept)          1247.0877  35.31413          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4294.6635  65.53368 -0.35196 
##  Residual                        84636.2499 290.92310          
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -35.882407    6.947483   48.801430
## RestrictorType1                       18.932878    9.780775 3374.129111
## RestrictorPosition1                  -32.048110   12.977998   57.956518
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  -73.059145   19.558888 3361.309704
##                                      t value     Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -5.16481 0.0000044245 ***
## RestrictorType1                      1.93572   0.05298498 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                 -2.46942   0.01650089 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -3.73534   0.00019057 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1  0.000              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.153  0.000       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
#compare models - no diff.
anova(vp.mod1, vp.mod2) #%>% xtable() #latex
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: exp2_tidied
## Models:
## vp.mod1: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant)
## vp.mod2: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##         npar       AIC       BIC     logLik -2*log(L)   Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## vp.mod1    8 50300.477 50349.852 -25142.238 50284.477                      
## vp.mod2    9 50302.066 50357.613 -25142.033 50284.066 0.41076  1    0.52158
#hard to increase ranfx complexity further - build maximal model then knockdown
vp.mod3 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Warning: Model failed to converge with 3 negative eigenvalues: -4.6e+01
## -3.2e+02 -2.0e+03
summary(vp.mod3) #singular fit
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorType *  
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 + RestrictorType *  
##     RestrictorPosition | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50252.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.778702 -0.319719 -0.089139  0.186434 36.726603 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                                Variance  Std.Dev.  Corr    
##  StimID      (Intercept)                             0.000   0.00000         
##              RestrictorType1                      1464.472  38.26842      NaN
##              RestrictorPosition1                   438.950  20.95113      NaN
##              RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  9493.901  97.43665      NaN
##  Participant (Intercept)                             0.000   0.00000         
##              RestrictorType1                      1597.062  39.96326      NaN
##              RestrictorPosition1                  4631.776  68.05715      NaN
##              RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  8372.659  91.50223      NaN
##  Residual                                        84029.721 289.87880         
##                    
##                    
##                    
##   1.00000          
##  -1.00000 -1.00000 
##                    
##                    
##  -0.19430          
##  -0.71726 -0.54416 
##                    
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -35.859904    4.873371 3363.865330
## RestrictorType1                       19.048159   12.100993   63.466864
## RestrictorPosition1                  -32.144187   13.447733   60.041013
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  -72.996131   26.076894   66.350641
##                                      t value            Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -7.35834 0.00000000000023285 ***
## RestrictorType1                      1.57410           0.1204368    
## RestrictorPosition1                 -2.39031           0.0199886 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -2.79926           0.0067004 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1  0.000              
## RstrctrPst1  0.000  0.027       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000 -0.338 -0.261
## optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
#drop RestrictorPosition from StimID intercept
vp.mod4 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 + RestrictorType | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Warning: Model failed to converge with 1 negative eigenvalue: -2.5e+01
summary(vp.mod4) #singular fit
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorType *  
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 + RestrictorType |      StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50232.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.747436 -0.320481 -0.098329  0.169222 36.615804 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                                Variance   Std.Dev.  Corr    
##  StimID      (Intercept)                           463.3619  21.52584         
##              RestrictorType1                      1733.8682  41.63974 -1.00000
##  Participant (Intercept)                          1280.4971  35.78403         
##              RestrictorType1                      1729.4613  41.58679 -1.00000
##              RestrictorPosition1                  4591.8941  67.76352 -0.16466
##              RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  6221.4087  78.87591  0.75861
##  Residual                                        83061.2966 288.20357         
##                    
##                    
##                    
##                    
##                    
##   0.16466          
##  -0.75861 -0.76756 
##                    
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                       Estimate Std. Error         df  t value
## (Intercept)                         -35.836677   7.273495  60.245764 -4.92702
## RestrictorType1                      18.887228  12.333910  69.498695  1.53133
## RestrictorPosition1                 -32.067221  13.103272  57.986917 -2.44727
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -73.021512  21.929789  98.343138 -3.32979
##                                         Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         0.0000068535 ***
## RestrictorType1                        0.1302285    
## RestrictorPosition1                    0.0174447 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1    0.0012245 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.448              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.071  0.049       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.228 -0.156 -0.242
## optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
#drop RestrictorType from Participant intercept
vp.mod5 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 + RestrictorType | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
summary(vp.mod5) #singular fit
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |  
##     Participant) + (1 + RestrictorType | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50250.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.707723 -0.321951 -0.101664  0.170191 37.233918 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance   Std.Dev.  Corr     
##  StimID      (Intercept)           458.2846  21.40758          
##              RestrictorType1      1707.3000  41.31949 -1.00000 
##  Participant (Intercept)          1251.8603  35.38164          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4405.0366  66.37045 -0.35566 
##  Residual                        83945.5095 289.73351          
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -35.814234    7.251335   59.284266
## RestrictorType1                       18.840508   11.106842   84.972894
## RestrictorPosition1                  -32.069240   13.020235   57.823532
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  -73.018603   19.479720 3359.911379
##                                      t value    Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -4.93898 0.000006744 ***
## RestrictorType1                      1.69630  0.09349035 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                 -2.46303  0.01677580 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -3.74844  0.00018093 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.183              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.150  0.000       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
## optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
#drop RestrictorType from StimID intercept - back to first mod
vp.mod6 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(vp.mod6) #OK, RestrictorPosition and ixn. effects
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |  
##     Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50257.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.689316 -0.318973 -0.102711  0.163990 37.518822 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance   Std.Dev.  Corr     
##  StimID      (Intercept)           193.3133  13.90372          
##  Participant (Intercept)          1247.0877  35.31413          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4294.6635  65.53368 -0.35196 
##  Residual                        84636.2499 290.92310          
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df
## (Intercept)                          -35.882407    6.947483   48.801430
## RestrictorType1                       18.932878    9.780775 3374.129111
## RestrictorPosition1                  -32.048110   12.977998   57.956518
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  -73.059145   19.558888 3361.309704
##                                      t value     Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                         -5.16481 0.0000044245 ***
## RestrictorType1                      1.93572   0.05298498 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                 -2.46942   0.01650089 *  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -3.73534   0.00019057 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1  0.000              
## RstrctrPst1 -0.153  0.000       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.000  0.000  0.000
#check model
check_model(vp.mod6) #OK
#compare - no diff.
anova(vp.mod1, vp.mod6) #%>% xtable() #latex
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: exp2_tidied
## Models:
## vp.mod1: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant)
## vp.mod6: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##         npar       AIC       BIC     logLik -2*log(L)   Chisq Df Pr(>Chisq)
## vp.mod1    8 50300.477 50349.852 -25142.238 50284.477                      
## vp.mod6    9 50302.066 50357.613 -25142.033 50284.066 0.41076  1    0.52158
#add covar
vp.mod7 <- lmer(VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                  TrialN +
                  (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                  (1 | StimID),
                data = exp2_tidied)
summary(vp.mod7) #ok, same fx
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + TrialN + (1 +  
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 50182.4
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.677950 -0.304942 -0.084367  0.165782 38.193853 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name                Variance   Std.Dev.  Corr     
##  StimID      (Intercept)           146.2105  12.09175          
##  Participant (Intercept)          1285.9437  35.86006          
##              RestrictorPosition1  4390.7133  66.26246 -0.32837 
##  Residual                        82811.9978 287.77074          
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                         Estimate   Std. Error           df
## (Intercept)                           38.5910751   10.9029380  290.9875452
## RestrictorType1                       18.5363573    9.6745972 3373.9983825
## RestrictorPosition1                  -30.2812449   12.9628041   58.0050857
## TrialN                                -1.2431386    0.1408981 3493.7263478
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  -67.1021767   19.3586833 3361.0873473
##                                      t value               Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                          3.53951             0.00046652 ***
## RestrictorType1                      1.91598             0.05545176 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                 -2.33601             0.02296862 *  
## TrialN                              -8.82296 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 -3.46626             0.00053437 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1 TrialN
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.004                     
## RstrctrPst1 -0.082  0.000              
## TrialN      -0.774  0.005 -0.015       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.027  0.000  0.001 -0.035
#compare - covar mod better
anova(vp.mod6, vp.mod7) #%>% xtable() #latex
## refitting model(s) with ML (instead of REML)
## Data: exp2_tidied
## Models:
## vp.mod6: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## vp.mod7: VP.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + TrialN + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##         npar       AIC       BIC     logLik -2*log(L)    Chisq Df
## vp.mod6    9 50302.066 50357.613 -25142.033 50284.066            
## vp.mod7   10 50227.042 50288.760 -25103.521 50207.042 77.02427  1
##                     Pr(>Chisq)    
## vp.mod6                           
## vp.mod7 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
#check
check_model(vp.mod7) #OK
mod_out(vp.mod7)
## 
## \begin{table}[!htbp] \centering 
##   \caption{} 
##   \label{} 
## \begin{tabular}{@{\extracolsep{5pt}}lD{.}{.}{-2} } 
## \\[-1.8ex]\hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textit{Dependent variable:}} \\ 
## \cline{2-2} 
## \\[-1.8ex] & \multicolumn{1}{c}{VP.RESID} \\ 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  Constant & 38.59^{***}$ $(10.90) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1 & 18.54$ $(9.67) \\ 
##   RestrictorPosition1 & -30.28^{*}$ $(12.96) \\ 
##   TrialN & -1.24^{***}$ $(0.14) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 & -67.10^{***}$ $(19.36) \\ 
##  \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## Observations & \multicolumn{1}{c}{3,540} \\ 
## Akaike Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{50,202.36} \\ 
## Bayesian Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{50,264.08} \\ 
## \hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## \textit{Note:}  & \multicolumn{1}{r}{$^{*}$p$<$0.05; $^{**}$p$<$0.01; $^{***}$p$<$0.001} \\ 
## \end{tabular} 
## \end{table}
#emms
vp_emms <- emmeans(vp.mod7, ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition,
                   adjust = "none") #we'll adjust when doing contrasts
vp_emms
##  RestrictorType RestrictorPosition emmean   SE  df lower.CL upper.CL
##  OTH            EXT                 -58.5 11.1 144    -80.5    -36.6
##  SUB            EXT                 -43.5 11.1 143    -65.5    -21.6
##  OTH            INT                   5.3 12.2 121    -18.9     29.5
##  SUB            INT                 -46.8 12.2 121    -71.0    -22.6
## 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95
#contrasts
contrast(vp_emms,
         adjust = "tukey",
         "pairwise") %>%
  xtable()
## % latex table generated in R 4.4.2 by xtable 1.8-8 package
## % Sat Mar 14 15:28:36 2026
## \begin{table}[ht]
## \centering
## \begin{tabular}{lrrrrl}
##   \hline
## contrast & estimate & SE & df & t.ratio & p.value \\ 
##   \hline
## OTH EXT - SUB EXT & -15.0147 & 13.6848 & 3369.58 & -1.097 & 0.6913 \\ 
##   OTH EXT - OTH INT & -63.8323 & 16.1822 & 139.83 & -3.945 & 0.0007 \\ 
##   OTH EXT - SUB INT & -11.7449 & 16.1750 & 139.58 & -0.726 & 0.8865 \\ 
##   SUB EXT - OTH INT & -48.8176 & 16.1761 & 139.62 & -3.018 & 0.0158 \\ 
##   SUB EXT - SUB INT & 3.2698 & 16.1738 & 139.55 & 0.202 & 0.9971 \\ 
##   OTH INT - SUB INT & 52.0874 & 13.6871 & 3369.84 & 3.806 & 0.0008 \\ 
##    \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{{\footnotesize Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger}}\\
## 
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{{\footnotesize P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates}}\\
## \end{tabular}
## \end{table}
#plot it
vp_ixn_plot <- emmip(vp.mod7,
                     RestrictorType ~ RestrictorPosition,
                     CIs = TRUE,
                     CIarg = list(lwd = .5,
                                  alpha = 1)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette) + #colour blind friendly palette
  labs(title = "VP EMM Reading Times Interaction Plot",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Mean Reading Time (ms.)",
       x = "RestrictorPosition") + #set up labels/title
  theme_light(base_size = 25, #default font size
              base_line_size = .5, #default line weight
              base_rect_size = 1, #default polygon border weight
              base_family = "Helvetica") + #font family Helvetica
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, #title font size
                                  hjust = 0.5), #center title
        legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1), #box around legend
        legend.position = "bottom") #legend at bottom
## Warning: Duplicated aesthetics after name standardisation: linewidth
vp_ixn_plot

Look at SPILL Region

#dataviz for condition
spill_viz <- exp2_tidied %>%
  filter(
    SPILL.RESID >
      quantile(SPILL.RESID, .01, na.rm = TRUE),
    SPILL.RESID <
      quantile(SPILL.RESID, .99, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = RestrictorType, #group by condition on x axis
             y = SPILL.RESID, #log RTs on y axis
             fill = RestrictorType)) + #colour by condition
  theme_light(base_size = 25, #default font size
              base_line_size = .5, #default line weight
              base_rect_size = 1, #default polygon border weight
              base_family = "Helvetica") + #font family Helvetica
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE) + #violin, don't trim ends
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.3, #boxplot
               outlier.shape = NA) + #don't show outlier dots
  scale_fill_manual(values = cbPalette) + #colour blind friendly palette
  labs(title = "SPILL Reading Times (ms.)",
       y = "Residual Reading Time (ms.)",
       x = NULL) +
  facet_wrap(~RestrictorPosition) +
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1), #box around legend
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 30), #center title, title font size
        legend.position = "bottom") + #legend at bottom
  coord_flip() + #flip coordinates so it's horizontal
  theme(legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 25),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
        strip.text = element_text(colour = "black"))
spill_viz

set.seed(9876)
spill.blmr1 <- buildmer(SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                          (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                          (1 + RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | StimID),
                        buildmerControl = buildmerControl(include = ~RestrictorType*RestrictorPosition),
                        data = exp2_tidied)
## Determining predictor order
## Fitting via gam, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## Currently evaluating LRT for: 1 | Participant, 1 | StimID
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant)
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID)
## Updating formula: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition
##     + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 | Participant)
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType | Participant,
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant, 1 | StimID
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorType | Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant)
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## Updating formula: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition
##     + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |
##     Participant)
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType | Participant, 1 | StimID
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType | Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## Updating formula: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition
##     + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |
##     Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType | Participant,
##     RestrictorType | StimID, RestrictorPosition | StimID
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 + RestrictorType | StimID)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 + RestrictorPosition |
##     StimID)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Ending the ordering procedure due to having reached the maximal
##     feasible model - all higher models failed to converge. The types of
##     convergence failure are: Singular fit
## Fitting ML and REML reference models
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## Fitting via lmer, with ML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## Testing terms
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant) + (1 | StimID)
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant)
##      grouping                              term
## 1        <NA>                                 1
## 2        <NA>                    RestrictorType
## 3        <NA>                RestrictorPosition
## 4        <NA> RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## 5 Participant                                 1
## 7 Participant                RestrictorPosition
## 9      StimID                                 1
##                               block         score Iteration          LRT
## 1                              <NA>            NA         1           NA
## 2                              <NA>            NA         1           NA
## 3                              <NA>            NA         1           NA
## 4                              <NA>            NA         1           NA
## 5                  NA Participant 1 -24.243094352         1           NA
## 7 NA Participant RestrictorPosition  -1.389588730         1 0.2430427361
## 9                       NA StimID 1  -1.317656023         1 0.2677621954
## Updating formula: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition
##     + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 + RestrictorPosition |
##     Participant)
## Fitting ML and REML reference models
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant)
## Fitting via lmer, with ML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant)
## Testing terms
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant)
##      grouping                              term
## 1        <NA>                                 1
## 2        <NA>                    RestrictorType
## 3        <NA>                RestrictorPosition
## 4        <NA> RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## 5 Participant                                 1
## 7 Participant                RestrictorPosition
##                               block        score Iteration          LRT
## 1                              <NA>           NA         2           NA
## 2                              <NA>           NA         2           NA
## 3                              <NA>           NA         2           NA
## 4                              <NA>           NA         2           NA
## 5                  NA Participant 1 -24.24309435         2           NA
## 7 NA Participant RestrictorPosition  -1.38958873         2 0.2491777628
## Updating formula: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition
##     + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting ML and REML reference models
## Fitting via lmer, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant)
## Fitting via lmer, with ML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant)
## Testing terms
## Fitting via gam, with REML: SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
##      grouping                              term            block        score
## 1        <NA>                                 1             <NA>           NA
## 2        <NA>                    RestrictorType             <NA>           NA
## 3        <NA>                RestrictorPosition             <NA>           NA
## 4        <NA> RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition             <NA>           NA
## 5 Participant                                 1 NA Participant 1 -24.24309435
##   Iteration                    LRT
## 1         3                     NA
## 2         3                     NA
## 3         3                     NA
## 4         3                     NA
## 5         3 0.00000000002960451145
## All terms are significant
## Finalizing by converting the model to lmerTest
summary(spill.blmr1)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML
## (p-values based on Wald z-scores) ['lmerMod']
## Formula: 
## SPILL.RESID ~ 1 + RestrictorType + RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition +  
##     (1 | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 52998.9
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.966872 -0.366336 -0.134775  0.155978 31.671171 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance   Std.Dev. 
##  Participant (Intercept)   3222.362  56.76585
##  Residual                185556.858 430.76311
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                      Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)                          2.181008  10.345699 0.21081  0.83303  
## RestrictorType1                     27.073729  14.479944 1.86974  0.06152 .
## RestrictorPosition1                 11.525932  14.479944 0.79599  0.42604  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1  7.136610  28.959887 0.24643  0.80535  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 0.000               
## RstrctrPst1 0.000  0.000        
## RstrcT1:RP1 0.000  0.000  0.000
#manual model
spill.mod1 <- lmer(SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                     (1 | Participant),
                   data = exp2_tidied)
summary(spill.mod1) #ok, no fx
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 52998.9
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.966872 -0.366336 -0.134775  0.155978 31.671171 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance   Std.Dev. 
##  Participant (Intercept)   3222.362  56.76585
##  Residual                185556.858 430.76311
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df t value
## (Intercept)                            2.181008   10.345699   57.999999 0.21081
## RestrictorType1                       27.073729   14.479944 3478.000001 1.86974
## RestrictorPosition1                   11.525932   14.479944 3478.000001 0.79599
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1    7.136610   28.959887 3478.000001 0.24643
##                                     Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)                         0.833772  
## RestrictorType1                     0.061604 .
## RestrictorPosition1                 0.426090  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 0.805363  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 0.000               
## RstrctrPst1 0.000  0.000        
## RstrcT1:RP1 0.000  0.000  0.000
#increase ranfx
spill.mod2 <- lmer(SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                     (1 | Participant) +
                     (1 | StimID),
                   data = exp2_tidied)
summary(spill.mod2) #ok, no fx
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: 
## SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + (1 | Participant) +  
##     (1 | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 52998.6
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -1.966256 -0.364428 -0.133106  0.158511 31.651612 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance   Std.Dev. 
##  StimID      (Intercept)    351.528  18.74908
##  Participant (Intercept)   3228.212  56.81735
##  Residual                185205.051 430.35456
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                        Estimate  Std. Error          df t value
## (Intercept)                            2.181008   10.625068   49.845211 0.20527
## RestrictorType1                       27.080419   14.468094 3433.882580 1.87173
## RestrictorPosition1                   11.530553   14.466420 3420.759943 0.79706
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1    7.164306   28.932839 3420.759943 0.24762
##                                     Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)                         0.838197  
## RestrictorType1                     0.061328 .
## RestrictorPosition1                 0.425474  
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 0.804444  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1
## RstrctrTyp1 0.000               
## RstrctrPst1 0.000  0.000        
## RstrcT1:RP1 0.000  0.000  0.000
#add covars to spill.mod2
spill.mod3 <- lmer(SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                     TrialN +
                     (1 | Participant) +
                     (1 | StimID),
                   data = exp2_tidied)
summary(spill.mod3) #ok, no fx
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: SPILL.RESID ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition + TrialN +  
##     (1 | Participant) + (1 | StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 52778.7
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -2.242149 -0.361003 -0.110985  0.181082 32.246981 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance   Std.Dev. 
##  StimID      (Intercept)    261.017  16.15602
##  Participant (Intercept)   3185.802  56.44291
##  Residual                174010.639 417.14582
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                                         Estimate   Std. Error           df
## (Intercept)                          186.3030406   16.0002032  272.5936073
## RestrictorType1                       26.0753532   14.0238349 3433.2123195
## RestrictorPosition1                   15.8870501   14.0253327 3419.8117515
## TrialN                                -3.0734322    0.2034169 3498.1408636
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1   21.9038547   28.0617090 3419.9761690
##                                       t value             Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                          11.64379 < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## RestrictorType1                       1.85936             0.063062 .  
## RestrictorPosition1                   1.13274             0.257403    
## TrialN                              -15.10903 < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1   0.78056             0.435115    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) RstrT1 RstrP1 TrialN
## RstrctrTyp1 -0.004                     
## RstrctrPst1  0.016  0.000              
## TrialN      -0.762  0.005 -0.021       
## RstrcT1:RP1  0.026  0.000  0.001 -0.035
#model output
mod_out(spill.mod3)
## 
## \begin{table}[!htbp] \centering 
##   \caption{} 
##   \label{} 
## \begin{tabular}{@{\extracolsep{5pt}}lD{.}{.}{-2} } 
## \\[-1.8ex]\hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  & \multicolumn{1}{c}{\textit{Dependent variable:}} \\ 
## \cline{2-2} 
## \\[-1.8ex] & \multicolumn{1}{c}{SPILL.RESID} \\ 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
##  Constant & 186.30^{***}$ $(16.00) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1 & 26.08$ $(14.02) \\ 
##   RestrictorPosition1 & 15.89$ $(14.03) \\ 
##   TrialN & -3.07^{***}$ $(0.20) \\ 
##   RestrictorType1:RestrictorPosition1 & 21.90$ $(28.06) \\ 
##  \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## Observations & \multicolumn{1}{c}{3,540} \\ 
## Akaike Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{52,794.67} \\ 
## Bayesian Inf. Crit. & \multicolumn{1}{c}{52,844.05} \\ 
## \hline 
## \hline \\[-1.8ex] 
## \textit{Note:}  & \multicolumn{1}{r}{$^{*}$p$<$0.05; $^{**}$p$<$0.01; $^{***}$p$<$0.001} \\ 
## \end{tabular} 
## \end{table}
#spill emms
spill_emms <- emmeans(spill.mod3, pairwise ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition, 
                      adjust = "none")
spill_emms
## $emmeans
##  RestrictorType RestrictorPosition emmean SE  df lower.CL upper.CL
##  OTH            EXT                 28.64 16 277     -2.8     60.1
##  SUB            EXT                 -8.39 16 277    -39.8     23.0
##  OTH            INT                  1.80 16 277    -29.6     33.2
##  SUB            INT                -13.32 16 277    -44.8     18.1
## 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95 
## 
## $contrasts
##  contrast          estimate   SE   df t.ratio p.value
##  OTH EXT - SUB EXT    37.03 19.8 3427   1.867  0.0620
##  OTH EXT - OTH INT    26.84 19.8 3420   1.352  0.1763
##  OTH EXT - SUB INT    41.96 19.8 3427   2.116  0.0344
##  SUB EXT - OTH INT   -10.19 19.8 3427  -0.514  0.6075
##  SUB EXT - SUB INT     4.94 19.8 3420   0.249  0.8035
##  OTH INT - SUB INT    15.12 19.8 3427   0.762  0.4460
## 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger
#contrasts
spill_contrasts <- contrast(spill_emms, 
                            "pairwise",
                            adjust = "tukey")
spill_contrasts %>%
  xtable()
## % latex table generated in R 4.4.2 by xtable 1.8-8 package
## % Sat Mar 14 15:30:04 2026
## \begin{table}[ht]
## \centering
## \begin{tabular}{lrrrrl}
##   \hline
## contrast & estimate & SE & df & t.ratio & p.value \\ 
##   \hline
## OTH EXT - SUB EXT & 37.0273 & 19.8369 & 3426.67 & 1.867 & 0.2427 \\ 
##   OTH EXT - OTH INT & 26.8390 & 19.8460 & 3419.94 & 1.352 & 0.5295 \\ 
##   OTH EXT - SUB INT & 41.9624 & 19.8337 & 3426.65 & 2.116 & 0.1482 \\ 
##   SUB EXT - OTH INT & -10.1883 & 19.8356 & 3426.78 & -0.514 & 0.9559 \\ 
##   SUB EXT - SUB INT & 4.9351 & 19.8318 & 3419.82 & 0.249 & 0.9946 \\ 
##   OTH INT - SUB INT & 15.1234 & 19.8402 & 3426.91 & 0.762 & 0.8714 \\ 
##    \hline
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{{\footnotesize Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger}}\\
## 
## \multicolumn{6}{l}{{\footnotesize P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates}}\\
## \end{tabular}
## \end{table}
#data frame of emms for dataviz
spill_emms_df <- as.data.frame(spill_emms$emmeans) %>%
  arrange(emmean)
#plot it
spill_ixn_plot <- ggplot(spill_emms_df,
                           aes(x = fct_reorder(RestrictorType, emmean), y = emmean,
                               colour = RestrictorType)) +
  facet_grid(~RestrictorPosition) +
  geom_point(size = 4) + #plot EMMs
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) + #error bars
  scale_colour_manual(values = cbPalette) + #colour blind friendly palette
  labs(title = "SPILL EMM Reading Times Plot",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Mean Reading Time (ms.)",
       x = "Restrictor Type") + #set up labels/title
  theme_light(base_size = 25, #default font size
              base_line_size = .5, #default line weight
              base_rect_size = 1, #default polygon border weight
              base_family = "Helvetica") + #font family Helvetica
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, #title font size
                                hjust = 0.5), #center title
      legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 1), #box around legend
      legend.position = "bottom") #legend at bottom
#print
spill_ixn_plot

COMPQs

Accuracy

#binomial model
set.seed(9876)
compacc.blmr1 <- buildmer(CompAcc ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                            TrialN +
                            (1 +  RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                            (1 +  RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | StimID),
                          family = "binomial",
                          data = exp2_tidied)
## Determining predictor order
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType, RestrictorPosition,
##     TrialN
