## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + RestrictorType
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType, RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorPosition
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via glm: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## Currently evaluating LRT for: 1 | Participant, 1 | StimID
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID)
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID)
## Currently evaluating LRT for: 1 | Participant, RestrictorType | StimID,
##     RestrictorPosition | StimID
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorType | StimID)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | StimID)
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType | Participant,
##     RestrictorPosition | Participant, RestrictorType | StimID,
##     RestrictorPosition | StimID
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 + RestrictorType | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 + RestrictorPosition | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorType | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 +
##     RestrictorPosition | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Ending the ordering procedure due to having reached the maximal
##     feasible model - all higher models failed to converge. The types of
##     convergence failure are: Optimizer reports not having finished (4)
##     lme4 reports not having converged (-1)
## Fitting ML and REML reference models
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Testing terms
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID)
##       grouping                              term
## 1         <NA>                                 1
## 5         <NA>                            TrialN
## 2         <NA>                    RestrictorType
## 3         <NA>                RestrictorPosition
## 4         <NA> RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition
## 10      StimID                                 1
## 6  Participant                                 1
##                                      block           score Iteration
## 1                                  NA NA 1              NA         1
## 5                             NA NA TrialN -1.284813908301         1
## 2                     NA NA RestrictorType -0.148571568996         1
## 3                 NA NA RestrictorPosition -0.010899695774         1
## 4  NA NA RestrictorType:RestrictorPosition -0.001396819193         1
## 10                             NA StimID 1            -Inf         1
## 6                         NA Participant 1 -5.535619280401         1
##               LRT
## 1              NA
## 5  0.378855608078
## 2              NA
## 3              NA
## 4  0.437493736930
## 10            NaN
## 6  0.003943765583
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting ML and REML reference models
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Testing terms
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorPosition +
##     (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType + (1
##     | StimID) + (1 | Participant)

##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')

##     RestrictorPosition + (1 | StimID)

## 1         <NA>                  1                  NA NA 1             NA
## 5         <NA>             TrialN             NA NA TrialN -1.28481390830
## 2         <NA>     RestrictorType     NA NA RestrictorType -0.14857156900
## 3         <NA> RestrictorPosition NA NA RestrictorPosition -0.01089969577
## 10      StimID                  1              NA StimID 1           -Inf
## 6  Participant                  1         NA Participant 1 -5.53561928040
##    Iteration            LRT
## 1          2             NA
## 5          2 0.369215562763
## 2          2 0.974560295817
## 3          2 0.891941646397
## 10         2            NaN
## 6          2 0.004231025294
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)

## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorPosition +
##     (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)

##     (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)

## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + RestrictorPosition + (1 |
##     StimID) + (1 | Participant)

##     Participant)

##     (1 | Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')

##     (1 | StimID)

## 10      StimID                  1              NA StimID 1           -Inf
## 6  Participant                  1         NA Participant 1 -5.53561928040
##    Iteration            LRT
## 1          3             NA
## 5          3 0.368736457297
## 3          3 0.892012545405
## 10         3            NaN
## 6          3 0.004167327217
## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + (1 | StimID) + (1 |
##     Participant)

##     Participant)

##     Participant)
## Testing terms

##     Participant)

## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + TrialN + (1 | StimID)

## 1         <NA>      1          NA NA 1           NA         4             NA
## 5         <NA> TrialN     NA NA TrialN -1.284813908         4 0.367104180603

## Updating formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)

##     Participant)

## Fitting via glmer, with ML: CompAcc ~ 1 + (1 | Participant)
## boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')

##       grouping term            block       score Iteration            LRT
## 1         <NA>    1          NA NA 1          NA         5             NA
## 10      StimID    1      NA StimID 1        -Inf         5            NaN
## 6  Participant    1 NA Participant 1 -5.53561928         5 0.003586807355
## All terms are significant
summary(compacc.blmr1) #no fx
## Generalized linear mixed model fit by maximum likelihood (Laplace
##   Approximation) (p-values based on Wald z-scores) [glmerMod]
##  Family: binomial  ( logit )
## Formula: CompAcc ~ 1 + (1 | StimID) + (1 | Participant)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
##       AIC       BIC    logLik -2*log(L)  df.resid 
##     269.6     288.1    -131.8     263.6      3537 
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -5.7469018 -0.0012068 -0.0012068  0.0181997  0.6064828 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance   Std.Dev.
##  StimID      (Intercept) 619.101711 24.88175
##  Participant (Intercept)   1.599669  1.26478
## Number of obs: 3540, groups:  StimID, 60; Participant, 59
## 
## Fixed effects:
##               Estimate Std. Error    z value Pr(>|z|)               Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept) -13.681826   1.439746  -9.502946        0 < 0.000000000000000222
##                
## (Intercept) ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Response Time

set.seed(9876)
comprt.blmr1 <- buildmer(CompRT ~ RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition +
                           TrialN +
                           (1 +  RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | Participant) +
                           (1 +  RestrictorType * RestrictorPosition | StimID),
                         data = exp2_tidied)
## Determining predictor order
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType, RestrictorPosition,
##     TrialN
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1 + RestrictorType
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1 + RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN
## Updating formula: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorType, RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorPosition
## Updating formula: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType
## Currently evaluating LRT for: RestrictorPosition
## Fitting via lm: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType +
##     RestrictorPosition

## All terms are significant
## Finalizing by converting the model to lmerTest
summary(comprt.blmr1) #RestrictorType fx (OTH > SUB)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML
## (p-values based on Wald z-scores) ['lmerMod']
## Formula: CompRT ~ 1 + TrialN + RestrictorType + (1 | Participant) + (1 |  
##     StimID)
##    Data: exp2_tidied
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 18631.7
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
## -2.0095013 -0.5473179 -0.1853208  0.2852808  7.4177664 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups      Name        Variance   Std.Dev. 
##  Participant (Intercept) 217268.212 466.12038
##  StimID      (Intercept)   9930.369  99.65124
##  Residual                372797.969 610.57184
## Number of obs: 1180, groups:  Participant, 59; StimID, 20
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                    Estimate  Std. Error   t value               Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)     2361.780852   74.357020  31.76272 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## TrialN            -6.689122    0.529924 -12.62280 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## RestrictorType1  102.114839   35.760334   2.85553              0.0042965 ** 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##             (Intr) TrialN
## TrialN      -0.432       
## RstrctrTyp1  0.015 -0.032
#emms
comprt_emms <- emmeans(comprt.blmr1@model, 
                       pairwise ~ RestrictorType, 
                       adjust = "tukey") #RTs slower in OTH conditions

Look at LOOKED vs. SEEMED

percept.lm1 <- lm(PP.RESID ~ LOOK_SEEM + TrialN,
                  data = exp2_tidied)
summary(percept.lm1) #nothing
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = PP.RESID ~ LOOK_SEEM + TrialN, data = exp2_tidied)
## 
## Residuals:
##       Min        1Q    Median        3Q       Max 
## -511.7155  -84.4219  -13.9327   53.1103 4757.1481 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                    Estimate  Std. Error   t value               Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)     50.31167482  7.52195389   6.68864      0.000000000026079 ***
## LOOK_SEEMseemed -5.61080679  6.70539397  -0.83676                0.40278    
## TrialN          -1.57795563  0.09692854 -16.27958 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 199.4689 on 3537 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.06981845, Adjusted R-squared:  0.06929248 
## F-statistic: 132.7417 on 2 and 3537 DF,  p-value: < 0.00000000000000022204
percept.lm2 <- lm(VP.RESID ~ LOOK_SEEM + TrialN,
                  data = exp2_tidied)
summary(percept.lm2) #nothing
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = VP.RESID ~ LOOK_SEEM + TrialN, data = exp2_tidied)
## 
## Residuals:
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
##  -520.9041   -90.5895   -22.4576    50.1824 11170.9157 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                   Estimate Std. Error  t value               Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)     44.9212552 11.0473931  4.06623             0.00004882 ***
## LOOK_SEEMseemed -9.9204077  9.8481225 -1.00734                0.31384    
## TrialN          -1.2660067  0.1423576 -8.89314 < 0.000000000000000222 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 292.9573 on 3537 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.02210018, Adjusted R-squared:  0.02154723 
## F-statistic: 39.96746 on 2 and 3537 DF,  p-value: < 0.00000000000000022204
percept.lm3 <- lm(SPILL.RESID ~ LOOK_SEEM + TrialN,
                  data = exp2_tidied)
summary(percept.lm3) #nothing
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = SPILL.RESID ~ LOOK_SEEM + TrialN, data = exp2_tidied)
## 
## Residuals:
##        Min         1Q     Median         3Q        Max 
##  -824.4046  -157.3868   -48.3189    75.8605 13582.5698 
## 
## Coefficients:
##                   Estimate Std. Error   t value             Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)     187.537538  15.890396  11.80194 < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## LOOK_SEEMseemed  -2.154178  14.165384  -0.15207              0.87914    
## TrialN           -3.076060   0.204765 -15.02239 < 0.0000000000000002 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 421.3851 on 3537 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.05997659, Adjusted R-squared:  0.05944505 
## F-statistic: 112.8361 on 2 and 3537 DF,  p-value: < 0.00000000000000022204
